items.title: Derrick White could also become a trade candidate now with Jaylen Brown gone.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Derrick White could also become a trade candidate now with Jaylen Brown gone.

The Celtics could further increase their surplus of draft picks and create more tax flexibility by trading him.

White has three years, $98 million remaining on his contract.

items.title: Boston Celtics after trading Jaylen Brown for Paul George and two first-round picks.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Boston Celtics after trading Jaylen Brown for Paul George and two first-round picks.

Salary cap situation relatively unchanged. George also has a trade bonus that increases his $54.1 million salary to $57.7 million max.

They have a surplus of 8 first-round picks and 7 seconds.

items.title: New Sixers GM Mike Gansey is on a heater since taking over:
items.author: Wolstat
items.body_excerpt:
New Sixers GM Mike Gansey is on a heater since taking over:
Steals Labaron Philon at 22
Signs Dean Wade (rock solid two-way role player) for cheap
Signs Hukporti for C depth for next to nothing.
Commits grand larceny on the rival Celtics for Jaylen Brown.

items.title: Quick offseason summary:
items.author: Keerthika Uthayakumar
items.body_excerpt:
Quick offseason summary:
- Giannis Antetokounmpo now plays for the Heat
- Kawhi Leonard is a Raptor again
- Jaylen Brown to the Sixers
- Ja Morant to the Blazers
- La Melo Ball & Anthony Edwards are teammates in Minnesota
- LeBron leaving the Lakers

The NBA is drunk!!

items.title: My immediate thoughts, which are mostly based on emotion:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
My immediate thoughts, which are mostly based on emotion:

I'm sad to see Jaylen Brown go. He was our guy for a decade and we watched him grow up in the NBA. He was never a perfect player, but he became an awesome one. He'll be missed greatly in the Boston community too.

1/2
